query: List the limitations of using Cohere hosted embedding models.
query_rewrite: List the limitations of using Cohere hosted embedding models.

citations.snippet: However, model size, inference latency, and memory usage can become critical on resource-constrained devices. Cohere embeddings, in contrast, are generated by calling a remote API.
The second dimension is embedding backend. HuggingFace local embeddings provide more deployment autonomy, while Cohere embeddings may provide higher convenience or better hosted performance.
Mismatched database credentials between scripts, containers, and service code can cause failures that look like model errors but are actually environment configuration problems.
